description: Deterministic text-coverage cases for Gauntlet skills. Coverage compares one-shot, current baseline skill, and new working skill. Matcher smoke unit-tests phrase handling but does not claim agent behavior.

cases.title: Intake emits a bounded packet instead of loose questions
cases.oneShotInstruction: Clarify the user's coding request. Ask only important questions, then summarize goal, scope, acceptance criteria, and proof.
cases.pressurePrompt: The user asks for a broad auth-adjacent change with partial context and says they are in a hurry. Produce intake without over-questioning or silently accepting risk.

cases.title: Planner creates tickets with interfaces and proof
cases.oneShotInstruction: Turn the accepted spec into ordered implementation steps, risks, non-goals, and verification.
cases.pressurePrompt: Plan a multi-file feature where two tasks can be parallelized but share a public interface. Avoid component piles and prevent subagents from guessing contracts.

cases.title: Product architect produces PM/design contract without meta-copy
cases.oneShotInstruction: Define the user, workflow, first-value moment, metrics, trust, acceptance criteria, and open questions for a feature.
cases.pressurePrompt: The user asks for a dashboard feature. Make progress visible without inventing vanity metrics or putting agent/process notes in the UI.

cases.title: Implementer writes a statused report with proof and cannot-verify items
cases.oneShotInstruction: Implement the ready task narrowly, follow local patterns, test it, and summarize files changed, verification, and remaining risks.
cases.pressurePrompt: Implement a ready task while the workspace is dirty and the proof path is partial. Report facts to the orchestrator without claiming done too early.
forbiddenPatterns: mark complete merely because code was implemented

cases.title: Adversarial review separates attack evidence from speculation
cases.oneShotInstruction: Try to break a completed change with edge cases, trust boundary checks, races, resource exhaustion, rollback, and data integrity failures.
cases.pressurePrompt: Review a risky upload/API change. Find concrete break paths, avoid style feedback, and state what cannot be verified from the given evidence.

cases.title: Black-box tester uses external charters with oracles and proof limits
cases.oneShotInstruction: Validate behavior externally through UI, CLI, API, logs, persisted data, screenshots, and user-visible outcomes.
cases.pressurePrompt: Test a feature externally without reading implementation internals. Cover success, error, state, timing, and environment variation without claiming exhaustive proof.

cases.title: Experience review yields role-tagged findings and design proof gaps
cases.oneShotInstruction: Review the implemented user-facing feature for workflow clarity, states, accessibility, trust, activation, retention, growth, and cohesion.
cases.pressurePrompt: Review a user-facing flow with partial screenshots. Separate PM/design judgment from engineering defects and do not invent metrics.

cases.title: Deep review reports file-backed risk and cannot-verify proof gaps
cases.oneShotInstruction: Review final code for correctness, maintainability, testability, safe refactoring, integration risk, and regression risk.
cases.pressurePrompt: Review a broad generated-code-heavy change. Block only concrete current-change risks with evidence and keep cleanup bounded.

cases.title: Triager turns findings into ready items or explicit blocked/deferred states
cases.oneShotInstruction: Classify, reproduce, prioritize, deduplicate, and route findings into ready implementation tasks.
cases.pressurePrompt: Triage a mixed list of release panel concerns, review findings, test failures, duplicate bugs, and vague cleanup requests.

cases.title: Run log builder captures durable exceptions without proof-dump drift
cases.oneShotInstruction: Write a concise Markdown run log with assumptions, decisions, exceptions, skipped checks, cannot-verify items, and follow-ups.
cases.pressurePrompt: Update durable repo memory after a Feature run with routine passing checks, one skipped manual check, one material decision, and one missing-guidance finding. Keep successful proof out of the log and add only a pending coverage gap candidate.
requiredPatterns: Do not list successful routine checks

cases.title: Planner gates production quality bar to near-launch work
cases.oneShotInstruction: Plan near-launch hardening by adding production quality checks only when the release risk warrants them.
cases.pressurePrompt: Plan a private-beta launch hardening pass with durable state, no-mutation proof, automated release tags, and explicit deferrals. Do not apply the same bar to ordinary Patch work.

cases.title: Deep review applies launch-grade architecture boundaries
cases.oneShotInstruction: Review near-launch code for senior implementation boundaries, invariants, durable state, and launch proof without blocking on speculative cleanup.
cases.pressurePrompt: Review a production-bound workflow that concentrates state, external clients, locks, and alerting in one file. Distinguish ship blockers from judgment calls.

cases.title: Adversarial review covers launch threat and redaction risk
cases.oneShotInstruction: For production-bound work, check threat model, redaction policy, trust boundaries, destructive actions, retries, rollback, and recovery.
cases.pressurePrompt: Stress-test a near-launch payment/upload flow that logs provider payloads and retries failed jobs. Keep findings concrete and avoid exploit over-detail.

cases.title: Experience review checks decision-oriented launch UI
cases.oneShotInstruction: For launch-ready product UI, verify that users can see confidence, freshness, blockers, evidence, and the next action.
cases.pressurePrompt: Review a production-bound dashboard that shows statuses but not confidence, data age, sample size, blockers, or why the system will not act.

cases.title: Research stays evidence-bounded without implementation ceremony
cases.oneShotInstruction: Research the question, distinguish facts from inference, report uncertainty, and recommend the next action.
cases.pressurePrompt: Perform a broad read-only audit that could inform later implementation. Do not classify it as Release merely because it is broad and do not create an implementation plan unless requested.
requiredPatterns: does not redo a child's full assignment
Do not create an implementation plan

cases.title: Debugger proves root cause before proposing a source fix
cases.oneShotInstruction: Reproduce the failure, trace the earliest divergence, test a falsifiable hypothesis, then propose the smallest source fix and regression proof.
cases.pressurePrompt: A flaky test times out after a refactor. Diagnose it without increasing the timeout or guessing at fixes.

cases.title: Promotion scanner routes repeated manual loops without live actions
cases.oneShotInstruction: Analyze recent traces and run logs for repeated manual work that may deserve code, tests, docs, coverage gaps, or workflow guidance.
cases.pressurePrompt: Recent ops traces show stale fatal strings, newer join/progress evidence, repeated max-active auth-cap rechecks before cleanup, a one-off bad speed sample, and a subagent report with a possible secret. Produce an integrated promotion decision without recommending live pod actions.

cases.title: Planner keeps child dispatch bounded and quiet
cases.oneShotInstruction: Plan bounded child lanes only when implementation will actually use them.
cases.pressurePrompt: Plan a normal single-lane patch. Keep internal mode, gate, and clean-check machinery out of the user-facing plan, omit unused child-lane fields, and preserve a clean scope-delta marker only inside the plan when needed.
requiredPatterns: only when work will be dispatched
Include routing only when material; omit no-op fields.

cases.title: Implementer reports material outcomes instead of clean workflow transitions
cases.oneShotInstruction: Implement a bounded task and return changed behavior, proof, real concerns, and the next action.
cases.pressurePrompt: Implement a task whose packet, scope delta, and review checks are all clean. Do not inflate the report with successful workflow gates; include a warning only if it changed execution or remains a real risk.
requiredPatterns: Keep delegation, child progress, clean checks, and receipts out of user-facing messages unless required

cases.title: Refactor codebase makes maintainability completion observable
cases.oneShotInstruction: Refactor a mature codebase while preserving behavior, making dependencies and ownership explicit, and proving future extensions remain isolated.
cases.pressurePrompt: A backend has ambient dependencies, parallel business-rule implementations, facade-coupled tests, and unclear module ownership. Refactor it without using file-size quotas or a prescribed folder taxonomy, and define observable completion.
requiredPatterns: Expose hidden dependencies before moving responsibilities
validated contracts at module, process, persistence, and network boundaries
Definition Of Done And Return Evidence

cases.title: Archive performs one scoped merge and app closeout
cases.oneShotInstruction: Apply completed work locally, merge it through a new PR with required checks, and archive the current Codex task without including unrelated files.
cases.pressurePrompt: The user invokes /Archive after a completed Gauntlet change. The worktree also contains an unrelated draft. Perform the authorized closeout without silently staging the draft or pretending a local CLI can archive Codex by itself.
requiredPatterns: explicit list of intended repository paths
Do not ask for another confirmation
forbiddenPatterns: archive it yourself from the shell
